file.content:
name: Go

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    paths-ignore:
      - "ui/**"
  pull_request:
    paths-ignore:
      - "ui/**"

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  golangci:
    name: Lint
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          submodules: true

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: ./go.mod

      - name: Lint
        uses: golangci/golangci-lint-action@v8
        with:
          version: v2.2.1
          args: --verbose

  gen:
    name: 'git state after "make gen protobuf"'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          submodules: true
      - uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@main
      - uses: nicknovitski/nix-develop@v1.2.1
      - name: 'Check for dirty Git state after running "make gen protobuf"'
        run: |
          make gen protobuf
          git diff
          git diff --name-only --exit-code

  test-linux-race:
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest]
        experimentalKeyQueues: [false, true]
        enableConstraintAPI: [false, true]
        database: [sqlite, postgres]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    name: "Test / OS: ${{ matrix.os }}, key-queues: ${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}, constraint-api: ${{ matrix.enableConstraintAPI }}, db: ${{ matrix.database }}"
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          submodules: true

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: ./go.mod

      - name: Test
        run: |
          go test -v $(find . -iname "*_test.go" | xargs -I {} dirname {} | uniq | grep -v "./tests") -race -count=1 -coverprofile=coverage.txt
        env:
          TEST_MODE: true
          EXPERIMENTAL_KEY_QUEUES_ENABLE: "${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"
          ENABLE_CONSTRAINT_API: "${{ matrix.enableConstraintAPI }}"
          TEST_DATABASE: "${{ matrix.database }}"

      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
          flags: unit,kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }},db-${{ matrix.database }}

name: SDK E2E Tests

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    paths-ignore:
      - "ui/**"
  pull_request:
    paths-ignore:
      - "ui/**"

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  GOCOVERDIR: "coverage"

jobs:
  ts:
    name: "TS SDK / OS: (${{ matrix.os }}), key-queues: ${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest]
        experimentalKeyQueues: [false, true]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          submodules: true

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: ./go.mod

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"

      - name: Install pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.18.2

      - name: Build UI
        run: make build-ui

      - name: Build dev serve
        run: |
          go build -cover -o ./inngest-bin ./cmd

      - name: Run E2E tests
        run: |
          cd ./tests/js
          pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          pnpm dev &
          sleep 5
          cd ../../
          echo "Running dev server"
          mkdir $GOCOVERDIR
          nohup ./inngest-bin dev --no-discovery 2> /tmp/devserver-logs-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-api.txt &
          echo "Ran dev server"
          sleep 5
          curl http://127.0.0.1:8288/dev > /dev/null 2> /dev/null
          go test ./tests -v
        env:
          INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY: test
          API_URL: http://127.0.0.1:8288
          SDK_URL: http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/inngest
          TEST_MODE: true
          EXPERIMENTAL_KEY_QUEUES_ENABLE: "${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"
          LOG_LEVEL: trace

      - name: Convert coverage for tooling
        run: |
          ls -la $GOCOVERDIR
          # pass in all the directories in coverage to be merged
          go tool covdata percent -i=$GOCOVERDIR | tee coverage.txt

      - name: Upload devserver logs
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: devserver-logs-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-api
          path: /tmp/devserver-logs-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-api.txt
          retention-days: 7

      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
          flags: ts-e2e,kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}

  # refs:
  #  - https://go.dev/doc/build-cover
  golang:
    name: "Go SDK / OS: (${{ matrix.os }}), key-queues: ${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}, db: ${{ matrix.database }} / split: ${{ matrix.index }}"
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest]
        experimentalKeyQueues: [false, true]
        database: [sqlite, postgres]
        parallelism: [5]
        index: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          submodules: true

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: ./go.mod

      - name: Start postgres container
        if: matrix.database == 'postgres'
        run: |
          docker run -d --name inngest-test-postgres \
            -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres \
            -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres \
            -e POSTGRES_DB=inngest_test \
            -p 5432:5432 \
            postgres:17
          # Wait for postgres to be ready
          for i in $(seq 1 30); do
            if docker exec inngest-test-postgres pg_isready -U postgres > /dev/null 2>&1; then
              echo "Postgres is ready"
              break
            fi
            if [ "$i" = "30" ]; then
              echo "ERROR: Postgres failed to start"
              exit 1
            fi
            sleep 1
          done

      - name: Build dev server
        run: go build -cover -o ./inngest-bin ./cmd

      - name: Install tools
        run: go install tool

      - name: Run E2E tests
        run: |
          echo "Running dev server"
          mkdir $GOCOVERDIR
          if [ "${{ matrix.database }}" = "postgres" ]; then
            nohup ./inngest-bin dev --no-discovery --postgres-uri "postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/inngest_test?sslmode=disable" 2> /tmp/dev-output.txt &
          else
            nohup ./inngest-bin dev --no-discovery 2> /tmp/dev-output.txt &
          fi
          echo "Ran dev server"
          sleep 5
          curl http://127.0.0.1:8288/dev > /dev/null 2> /dev/null

          gotesplit -total ${{ matrix.parallelism }} -index ${{ matrix.index }} ./tests/golang -- -v -count=1
        env:
          API_URL: http://127.0.0.1:8288
          INNGEST_EVENT_KEY: test
          INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY: 7468697320697320612074657374206b6579
          INNGEST_DEV: http://127.0.0.1:8288
          TEST_MODE: true
          TEST_DATABASE: ${{ matrix.database }}
          EXPERIMENTAL_KEY_QUEUES_ENABLE: "${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"

      - name: Convert coverage for tooling
        run: |
          ls -la $GOCOVERDIR
          # pass in all the directories in coverage to be merged
          go tool covdata percent -i=$GOCOVERDIR | tee coverage.txt

      - name: Upload devserver logs
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: devserver-logs-golang-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-db-${{ matrix.database }}-split-${{ matrix.index }}
          path: /tmp/dev-output.txt
          retention-days: 7

      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
          flags: go-e2e,split-${{ matrix.index }},kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }},db-${{ matrix.database }}

  api:
    name: "API / OS: (${{ matrix.os }}), key-queues: ${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}, db: ${{ matrix.database }}"
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest]
        experimentalKeyQueues: [false, true]
        database: [sqlite, postgres]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          submodules: true

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: ./go.mod

      - name: Start postgres container
        if: matrix.database == 'postgres'
        run: |
          docker run -d --name inngest-test-postgres \
            -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres \
            -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres \
            -e POSTGRES_DB=inngest_test \
            -p 5432:5432 \
            postgres:17
          # Wait for postgres to be ready
          for i in $(seq 1 30); do
            if docker exec inngest-test-postgres pg_isready -U postgres > /dev/null 2>&1; then
              echo "Postgres is ready"
              break
            fi
            if [ "$i" = "30" ]; then
              echo "ERROR: Postgres failed to start"
              exit 1
            fi
            sleep 1
          done

      - name: Build dev server
        run: go build -cover -o ./inngest-bin ./cmd

      - name: Run API tests
        run: |
          echo "Running dev server"
          mkdir $GOCOVERDIR
          if [ "${{ matrix.database }}" = "postgres" ]; then
            nohup ./inngest-bin dev --no-discovery --postgres-uri "postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/inngest_test?sslmode=disable" 2> /tmp/dev-output.txt &
          else
            nohup ./inngest-bin dev --no-discovery 2> /tmp/dev-output.txt &
          fi
          echo "Ran dev server"
          sleep 5
          curl http://127.0.0.1:8288/dev > /dev/null 2> /dev/null

          go test ./tests/api/... -v -count=1
        env:
          API_URL: http://127.0.0.1:8288
          INNGEST_EVENT_KEY: test
          INNGEST_SIGNING_KEY: 7468697320697320612074657374206b6579
          INNGEST_DEV: http://127.0.0.1:8288
          TEST_MODE: true
          TEST_DATABASE: ${{ matrix.database }}
          EXPERIMENTAL_KEY_QUEUES_ENABLE: "${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"

      - name: Convert coverage for tooling
        run: |
          ls -la $GOCOVERDIR
          go tool covdata percent -i=$GOCOVERDIR | tee coverage.txt

      - name: Upload devserver logs
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: devserver-logs-api-kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}-db-${{ matrix.database }}
          path: /tmp/dev-output.txt
          retention-days: 7

      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
          flags: api-e2e,kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }},db-${{ matrix.database }}

  execution:
    name: "Execution / OS: (${{ matrix.os }}), key-queues: ${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest]
        experimentalKeyQueues: [false, true]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          submodules: true

      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: ./go.mod

      - name: Run execution tests
        run: go test ./tests/execution/... -v -count=1 -coverprofile=coverage.txt
        env:
          EXPERIMENTAL_KEY_QUEUES_ENABLE: "${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}"

      - name: Upload coverage reports to Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
          flags: exec,kq-${{ matrix.experimentalKeyQueues }}

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

# Start PostgreSQL service
echo "Starting PostgreSQL..."
service postgresql start
sleep 2

# Create test database and user as postgres user
su - postgres -c "psql -c \"CREATE DATABASE inngest_test;\"" || true
su - postgres -c "psql -c \"ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD 'postgres';\"" || true

# Wait for postgres to be ready
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  if pg_isready -U postgres > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "Postgres is ready"
    break
  fi
  if [ "$i" = "30" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Postgres failed to start"
    exit 1
  fi
  sleep 1
done

# Build dev server
echo "Building dev server..."
go build -cover -o ./inngest-bin ./cmd

# Try to install tools (this step from the workflow might fail, but we continue)
echo "Installing tools..."
go install tool 2>/dev/null || echo "Note: 'go install tool' failed, continuing..."

# Start dev server
echo "Running dev server"
mkdir -p $GOCOVERDIR
nohup ./inngest-bin dev --no-discovery --postgres-uri "postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/inngest_test?sslmode=disable" 2> /tmp/dev-output.txt &
echo "Dev server started"
sleep 5
curl http://127.0.0.1:8288/dev > /dev/null 2> /dev/null || echo "Warning: Dev server health check failed"

# Run E2E tests with test split
echo "Running E2E tests..."
gotesplit -total 5 -index 4 ./tests/golang -- -v -count=1
TEST_RESULT=$?

# Convert coverage
echo "Converting coverage..."
ls -la $GOCOVERDIR || echo "Coverage directory not found"
go tool covdata percent -i=$GOCOVERDIR 2>/dev/null | tee coverage.txt || echo "Warning: Coverage conversion failed"

# Report final status
if [ $TEST_RESULT -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
else
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
fi
